name: get_stock_price
description: Retrieves the latest market price for a publicly traded security by ticker symbol. Optionally includes extended hours (pre-market and after-hours) pricing data.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol of the security to look up (e.g., 'AAPL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA').
ticker.$comment: Ticker symbols are case-insensitive; normalized to uppercase server-side. Exchange suffix (e.g., 'VOD.L') may be needed for non-US listings.

exchange.description: Optional exchange code to disambiguate tickers listed on multiple exchanges (e.g., 'NYSE', 'NASDAQ', 'LSE', 'TSE').
exchange.$comment: When omitted, the backend defaults to the primary listing exchange for the ticker. Required for tickers traded on multiple exchanges.

include_extended_hours.description: Whether to include pre-market and after-hours trading price data in the response.
include_extended_hours.$comment: Extended hours data has higher latency and wider spreads; disabled by default to return regular session prices only.

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the returned price. Prices are converted from native currency if different.
currency.$comment: Currency conversion uses mid-market FX rates at the time of the request. Default USD is appropriate for most US-listed securities.
